name: Marcus Thompson
text: Lupin made buying my first luxury car an absolute pleasure. No pressure, transparent pricing, and an incredible selection. The team walked me through every feature of the BMW and even helped me choose the right financing option. I drove away in my dream car the same day!

name: Sarah Williams
text: The trade-in process was seamless and they gave me fair market value for my old car. The team was professional, knowledgeable, and never once made me feel pressured. The GLE 450 is absolutely stunning and I couldn't be happier. Highly recommend Lupin to anyone looking for a luxury vehicle.

name: David Chen
text: Got approved for financing in under 20 minutes! The interest rate was significantly better than what my own bank offered. The whole experience from browsing online to driving home took just 3 hours. The online inventory search made it easy to find exactly what I was looking for beforehand.

name: Jennifer Rodriguez
text: I've bought three cars from Lupin over the years and each time the service gets better. Their certified pre-owned program gives you real peace of mind — the 300-point inspection is thorough and the warranty is genuine. I won't shop anywhere else for my next vehicle. Outstanding dealership.

name: Michael Foster
text: The online search tool made it incredibly easy to narrow down exactly what I wanted before visiting. When I arrived, the car was exactly as described — no hidden fees, no surprises. My salesperson was genuinely passionate about the Porsche and it showed. Perfect transaction from start to finish.

name: Amelia Johnson
text: Their after-sales service is absolutely exceptional. Even months after purchasing, the team follows up and helps with any questions or concerns. The 7-day return policy gave me confidence to make my decision without feeling rushed. That's the kind of service that creates customers for life.

name: Robert Kim
text: I was skeptical about buying an EV from a traditional dealership but Lupin's electric vehicle team knew the Model S Plaid inside and out. They walked me through charging, software updates, and long-term ownership. 1.99 seconds to 60 mph is something I'll never get tired of. Incredible car, incredible team.

name: Lisa Patel
text: As a first-time car buyer, I was nervous about the whole process. The team at Lupin was incredibly patient — they explained everything clearly and never tried to upsell me on things I didn't need. The CR-V Hybrid is perfect for my commute. Getting 43 MPG in the city is just amazing.
